name: Sichuan Languang Justbon Services Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Languang Justbon Services Group Co., Ltd. provides property management services in China. It offers property management services, including security, cleaning, greening and gardening, repairs and maintenance services; consultancy services; and community value-added services, as well as marketing management and information technology research services. It serves property developers, property owners, and residents. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China. As of April 16, 2021, Sichuan Languang Justbon Services Group Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Country Garden Property Services HK Holdings Company Limited.
